Professional web presence from day one

DMK Roofing came to BaldyBuilds as a brand-new business needing a professional online presence before they took on their first jobs. They had a logo and a phone number. We handled everything else.

## What we built

A clean, fast, mobile-first website covering their full range of roofing services across Ayrshire. The site features a contact form, clear service pages, and is fully optimised for local search.

## The result

DMK Roofing launched with a professional web presence on day one. No Facebook page, no template site. Just a proper business website that gives clients confidence before they pick up the phone.
